task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened and read the damage assessment report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/damage_assessment_report.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into the Odoo application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the Odoo interface (e.g., the main app dashboard or Inventory app) indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify a scrap order was processed for the Industrial Safety Helmets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Odoo Scrap Orders list or form view showing a scrap entry for 'Industrial Safety Helmet - Class E' with a quantity of 25. The status should ideally show as 'Done' or validated.

task_completion.description: Verify a scrap order was processed for the Heavy Duty Pallet Jacks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Odoo Scrap Orders list or form view showing a scrap entry for 'Heavy Duty Pallet Jack - 5500lb' with a quantity of 4. The status should ideally show as 'Done' or validated.

task_completion.description: Verify a scrap order was processed for the Corrugated Shipping Boxes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Odoo Scrap Orders list or form view showing a scrap entry for 'Corrugated Shipping Box - 24x18x12' with a quantity of 85. The status should ideally show as 'Done' or validated.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used a web browser to interact with Odoo rather than bypassing the UI with API/curl commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Odoo interface is visible inside a standard web browser window (e.g., Chromium or Firefox) with standard browser chrome (address bar, tabs).

integrity.description: Ensure the scrap orders were created in the actual Odoo system and not mocked in a text file or HTML mock-up.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots display the authentic Odoo Inventory application layout, including the top navigation bar, breadcrumbs, and standard Odoo list/form styling.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the scrap order records.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element, DOM editor) are open or visible in the screenshots showing the final scrap orders.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The damage assessment report is located at '/home/ga/Desktop/damage_assessment_report.txt'. The agent must create and validate scrap orders in Odoo for exactly three products with the following quantities: 1) 'Industrial Safety Helmet - Class E' (Qty: 25), 2) 'Heavy Duty Pallet Jack - 5500lb' (Qty: 4), and 3) 'Corrugated Shipping Box - 24x18x12' (Qty: 85).
